sources.label: Elgiganten outlet latest
sources.notes: Runs an Apify-backed Elgiganten Sweden outlet search and keeps only URLs under /product/outlet/ before sending Discord alerts.

sources.label: NetOnNet Outlet
sources.notes: Scrapes NetOnNet's outlet/clearance page via Next.js RSC HTML parsing. Collects up to ~480 products across 10 pages with no API key required.

sources.label: Webhallen Fyndware (outlet)
sources.notes: Fetches all Fyndvara (outlet) products from Webhallen via their internal productdiscovery API. No Apify required. Includes regularPrice as reference price for discount calculation.

sources.label: Komplett B-grade
sources.notes: Uses Apify cheerio-scraper to fetch Komplett demovaror category pages on Apify's infrastructure (bypasses Railway IP blocks). Each page embeds 24 products as JSON. Reference prices fetched lazily from product pages and cached.

sources.label: ProShop Outlet
sources.notes: Uses Apify cheerio-scraper to scrape ProShop's Cloudflare-protected outlet listing. Extracts products from li.site-productlist-item elements across up to 8 pages.

sources.label: Power Erbjudanden
sources.notes: Uses Apify playwright-scraper to render Power.se's Angular SPA deals page. Injects consent cookie and reloads to capture product API responses. Falls back to DOM extraction.

sources.label: Approved or self-hosted RSS feed
sources.notes: Useful for community deal feeds or approved marketplace exports. If a site blocks direct scraping, prefer feeds or official APIs instead.
